name: stackra/architecture
purpose: Architectural enforcement — prevents direct Model access outside Repository / Factory / Seeder, plus 33 rules across layering, Octane safety, filesystem, and shape.
capabilities: Layering: Controller, Service/Action, Repository, Model enforcement
33 rules across layering, Octane safety, filesystem, model/job/command
when_to_use: Running architectural checks in CI to catch cross-layer violations, unauthorized static state, or forbidden Laravel APIs.
when_not_to_use: For runtime cross-request enforcement, PHPStan already covers most cases; the sibling PHPStan extension auto-registers.
